title: oxydectes nummularia
intro: Oxydectes nummularia, also known as the Australian bluebell or New Zealand bluebell, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, as well as aiding in the treatment of fever, coughs, and respiratory issues. Oxydectes nummularia is often prepared for medicinal use in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
